prompt: Change the ratio of each category from left to right to 30:30:40.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1. Modify the information graphic to update the percentage distribution for the three categories from left to right.
The leftmost category, represented by the monitor icon and gray stacked bar, should be changed to 30%.
The middle category, represented by the tablet icon and green stacked bar, should remain at 30%.
The rightmost category, represented by the smartphone icon and blue stacked bar, should be changed to 40%.
Ensure the percentage labels and the visual height of the corresponding stacked bars accurately reflect these new ratios.
objects: percentage label "30%" for the leftmost category
percentage label "30%" for the middle category
percentage label "40%" for the rightmost category
